name: Domestic travel insurance necessity
description: User asks if travel insurance is needed for domestic trips

input.message: I'm going on a trip to Ladakh next month. Do I need travel insurance for domestic travel? I already have health insurance with Star Health.

notes: Must explain: Health insurance covers hospitalisation but not trip cancellation, baggage loss, adventure sports. Ladakh = high altitude = adventure activity exclusion in most health policies. Domestic travel insurance covers evacuation, trip interruption. Recommend for adventure/remote destinations.
